LinkAuditDefinition.description: Configuration for the Link Audit package. Every value is optional and has a sensible default, so the feature works with no configuration at all.

Enabled.description: Master on/off switch for the scheduled crawl.

RootDocumentTypeAlias.description: Document-type alias of the content roots to crawl. When empty (the default) every content root is crawled; set it to restrict the audit to roots of a single type (e.g. a site's home/start page type).

FlaggedHostPatterns.description: Host patterns that should never appear in content links; reported as a 'Flagged' finding. Supports a leading '*.' wildcard. Defaults to [ "*.umbraco.io" ] when unconfigured.

IgnoredHosts.description: Hosts to exclude from the audit completely — links to them are neither flagged nor probed nor reported. Exact host match, case-insensitive, no wildcard.

ExternalCheckEnabled.description: Whether to HTTP-probe external links for 404s.

UserAgent.description: User-Agent header sent on external probes. When left empty, a default of 'LinkAudit/1.0 (+{site root})' is used, resolved from the running site's own absolute URL at crawl time.

IgnoredStatusCodes.description: HTTP status codes to treat as OK rather than reporting as warnings. Use for links you knowingly can't verify anonymously — e.g. 401/403 for pages behind a login.

ExternalTimeoutSeconds.description: Per-request timeout for external probes, in seconds.

ExternalConcurrency.description: Maximum number of external probes in flight at once.

IntervalHours.description: How often the crawl runs, in hours. Clamped to an hourly minimum; a non-positive value falls back to the 24-hour default.

StartupDelayMinutes.description: Delay after app startup before the first crawl, in minutes.
